summary: P0 Auth Fix Verification Complete. All 18 backend tests passed. Verified: 1) All user-protected endpoints return 401 when not authenticated (no more 'default_user' fallback), 2) /api/premium/status returns {is_premium: false} when not logged in (NOT 401), 3) Frontend handles 401 by redirecting to login, 4) Pricing displayed correctly: 19 kr/mån and 149 kr/år.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ require_user_id() function correctly raises 401 if not authenticated (line 2198-2203 in server.py)
✅ get_user_id() function returns None if not authenticated (no default_user fallback)
✅ /api/premium/status correctly returns {is_premium: false} for unauthenticated users (line 1821-1828)
✅ Frontend apiFetch helper in appStore.ts and premiumStore.ts handles 401 by clearing auth state
✅ Pricing correctly shows 19 kr/mån and 149 kr/år on premium page
✅ CoopSettings, Hen, EggRecord, Transaction Pydantic models have user_id as required field (no default)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Auth handling verified via console logs and UI screenshots

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration 17
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 auth fix verified complete. All protected endpoints return 401 without auth. Premium status endpoint returns {is_premium: false} instead of 401. Frontend correctly redirects to login on 401. Pricing (19 kr/mån, 149 kr/år) verified on premium page.

1_remove_default_user_fallback.details: require_user_id() raises HTTPException 401 if not authenticated. No 'default_user' default in Pydantic models.

3_frontend_401_handling.details: apiFetch helper in appStore.ts and premiumStore.ts detects 401 and calls useAuthStore.getState().setUser(null) to clear auth state, triggering redirect to login. Console log confirmed: 'Navigation check: {hasSeenOnboarding: true, isAuthenticated: false, ...}'

screenshots_captured: p0_auth_initial.png - Welcome screen shown when not authenticated
p0_premium_page.png - Premium page with correct pricing (19 kr/mån, 149 kr/år)
